title: Pagaea nemorosa
taxonomy: Pagaea nemorosa belongs to the family Polygonaceae and is a type of flowering plant, specifically a species within the Polygonum genus. It is native to the temperate regions of Asia and Europe. The plant is also known as Persian knotweed or Persian buckthorn. It is a perennial herb with a woody base and can grow up to 3 meters in height. Further classification of Pagaea nemorosa includes being a member of the order Caryophyllales.
